title: Meta-Mathematics Deep III: Forcing, Inner Models & The Structure of EML-∞

generic_filter.reason: Generic G is not in any ground model: EML-∞ object

martin_axiom.statement: MA: for every ccc poset P and n < ω family of dense sets, generic filter exists
martin_axiom.consequence: 2^ℵ₀ can be arbitrarily large while MA holds

independence_landscape.method: V=L proves it; forcing can refute it

cohen_forcing.key_insight: Cohen forcing = tool for navigating EML-∞; it reveals the landscape inside EML-∞

constructible_universe_L.large_cardinals_in_L: Only very small ones (inaccessibles might not exist)
constructible_universe_L.reason: Constructible = EML-finite definability; smallest inner model

cantor_paradise.beth_fixed_point: ℵ_ω = beth_ω (EML-∞: fixed point of ω-iteration)

inner_models.key_insight: Constructible universe L = EML-2; above Woodin = EML-∞ territory

relative_vs_absolute.G\u00f6del_sentence: Relatively undecidable (true in standard model, false in non-standard)
relative_vs_absolute.absolute_undecidability: Hypothetical EML-∞ barrier with no extension resolving it
relative_vs_absolute.status: No known absolute undecidables — conjecture: RH may be in this class

omega_logic.decides_pi1: All Π₁ sentences (including Goldbach if true)
omega_logic.strength: Strictly above all large cardinal axioms

absolute_undecidability.key_insight: EML-∞ has internal structure: a stratified tower of consistency strengths

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Topological properties of forcing posets (ccc, properness)
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: All independence results, forcing extensions, large cardinals, omega-logic

key_theorem: The EML Forcing Depth Theorem: Cohen forcing reveals that EML-∞ is not a wall but a stratified landscape. The constructible universe L = EML-2 (every set EML-finitely definable). Each forcing extension adds an EML-∞ layer. The large cardinal hierarchy stratifies EML-∞ from within. EML-∞ has at least ω levels of internal complexity, and potentially absolutely undecidable statements at its summit.
rabbit_hole_log: Cohen forcing poset size = 2^n = EML-1: structure beneath EML-∞
Generic filter G ∉ any ground model = EML-∞ object in ground model's perspective
L = EML-2: Gödel showed the minimal model is EML-finite!
Core model K below Woodin = EML-2: maximal EML-2 inner model
Above K: EML-∞ territory. Every large cardinal is a new EML-∞ level
Absolute undecidability: if it exists, it's beyond all EML-∞ levels = 'meta-EML-∞'

connections.S143_cosmology_v3: Holography (EML-∞ → EML-2): analogous to L reducing EML-∞ → EML-2
connections.S140_grand_synthesis_8: Horizon Theorem: EML-∞ has internal structure — not a single level
